{"id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.3","title":"Gateway: Inter-mesh routing via Yggdrasil","description":"## Overview

Route packets between local mesh and remote meshes via Yggdrasil backbone.

## Packet flow

### Local mesh → Remote mesh
1. Node A sends packet to Node B (different mesh)
2. Gateway A receives via LoRa
3. Lookup destination:
   - Not in local mesh
   - Destination is Yggdrasil address (02xx::/7)
4. Forward to Yggdrasil interface
5. Yggdrasil routes to Gateway B
6. Gateway B delivers via LoRa

### Remote mesh → Local mesh
1. Packet arrives on Yggdrasil interface
2. Destination is local mesh node
3. Lookup in RPL routing table
4. Forward via LoRa

## Routing table integration

### Local routes (from RPL)
- Populated by DAO messages
- Direct delivery via LoRa

### Remote routes (from Yggdrasil)
- All 02xx::/7 → Yggdrasil interface
- Yggdrasil handles next-hop selection

### Decision logic
```
if dst in local_rpl_table:
    forward_via_lora(dst)
elif dst.is_yggdrasil_address():
    forward_via_yggdrasil(dst)
elif dst.is_internet():
    forward_via_backhaul(dst)  # Tailscale/WireGuard
else:
    icmpv6_unreachable()
```

## Address recognition

How to know if address is Yggdrasil vs internet:
- 02xx::/7 → Yggdrasil
- fd00:lichen::/32 → Local ULA (shouldn't route globally)
- Everything else → Internet (via backhaul)

## MTU considerations

- Yggdrasil has its own encapsulation
- Effective MTU may be reduced
- SCHC compression helps
- May need path MTU discovery","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:34.602457Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:34.602457Z","labels":["gateway","routing","yggdrasil","global","networking"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:34.763381Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:34.875118Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
